feedback.details: Diagram passes mmdc validation (exit 0), contains exactly 7 container nodes (llm-switch, consul-agent, vault-server, nomad-client, qwen-local, nemotron-local, frontier-api-gateway), and shows correct C4 relationships with external AI Application entity. No orphan nodes.

Diagram includes all required components with correct C4 IDs (backend/c2-container.md:9-15). Minor issue: vault-server should likely be vault-agent per C4 naming conventions, and Nomad client is labeled as nomad-client rather than standard nomad-agent. Missing explicit contains relationships between boundary and containers.

No Nomad job specification exists in the document. Missing: HCL job definition, GPU resource syntax (resources { gpu = 1 }), Consul health check with /health/ready endpoint, interval 10s, timeout 3s, Vault agent configuration, token renewal, and ACL roles. This is a fundamental omission for a deployment artifact.

No OpenAPI 3.0 specification present. Missing: endpoint definitions, authentication requirements (X-API-Key header, OAuth2 Bearer tokens), rate limiting headers (X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Limit), curl examples for GET/POST/PUT/DELETE, request body JSON schemas, and HTTP status code documentation (200, 400, 401, 403, 429, 500, 503). Document only contains a diagram and relationship descriptions.

No citations to technology-choices.md section/line numbers. Missing: Go version specification (1.21+), Docker base image (gcr.io/distroless/static-debian11), bifrost library version (v0.4.0+), performance benchmarks, and security audit references. Only mentions Go, bifrost at lines 9,15 without versioning or rationale.

Missing YAML frontmatter with document metadata (author, date, version). Heading hierarchy incomplete (H1 present, but no H2 sectionsjumps to H3 at line 28). Code blocks lack language identifiers (line 5 should be ```mermaid not ```). Document lacks structural organization with sections.

No error handling documentation. Missing: timeout values (30s LLM inference, 5s Consul discovery, 10s Vault operations), retry logic (3 attempts with exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s), circuit breaker thresholds (5 failures in 30s triggers open state for 60s), dead-letter queue configuration, and PagerDuty alerting integration.

No security specifications. Missing: TLS 1.3 requirements with cipher suites (TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384), mTLS for service mesh with 24h certificate rotation, API key rotation procedure (90-day max age), Vault secrets path structure (/secret/c2/*), and ACL policies limiting read/write permissions by service account.

No performance constraints documented. Missing: p99 latency SLA < 200ms at 1000 QPS, memory limits (2GB with OOMKilled prevention), CPU limits (4000 millicores with burst), concurrent connection limits (100 per instance), and graceful degradation behavior (load shedding at 80% CPU).

overall_summary: The c2-container.md document represents a superficial container diagram that fails to meet 7 of 9 sprint criteria. While the Mermaid diagram validates successfully and contains all 7 required container nodes, the document completely lacks the Nomad job specification, OpenAPI 3.0 API documentation, technology choices citations, error handling/scenario documentation, security/compliance specifications, and performance/resource constraints. The markdown structure is deficient (missing frontmatter, H2 sections, code block language identifiers). This is a diagram-only document masquerading as comprehensive container architecture documentation. To achieve minimum passing (5.0), the document needs at minimum: (1) complete Nomad HCL job specification with GPU resources, health checks, and Vault configuration; (2) full OpenAPI specification; and (3) error handling documentation with timeouts and retry logic. Currently scoring 1.0/10.0 on critical implementation criteria.
